title: Creepy Crawly Kinematics
description: Creepy Crawly Kinematics is a utility project that simulates the movement of a multi-legged creature using inverse kinematics. It includes features such as controlling the creature's limbs, adjusting leg stiffness, and visualizing the movement of each segment. The project is built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and offers an interactive interface for users to control the creature's movement.
